response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems work; their resume emphasizes JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile apps with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or C++-centric system design.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with diverse tech exposure
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in engineering practices
Active open-source contributions and architectural initiative
concerns: No demonstrable 8+ years of C++ experience as required
Lacks documented cloud compute platform or distributed systems leadership
Minimal evidence of software architecture or infrastructure ownership in cloud environments
